title: Root fabric --help omits the public uninstall command
description: The root `fabric --help` grouped renderer hardcodes command groups and omits the public `uninstall` command, even though the runtime command registry includes it and the package README lists it as public. Users relying on root help cannot discover uninstall; this is distinct from existing CLI surface test drift because the user-visible root help output itself is incomplete.
fix_direction: Generate grouped root help from the command registry or add `uninstall` to the grouped renderer, then add a root-help drift/snapshot test that compares rendered public commands with the runtime registry and README public surface.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 6 dedup + issue creation worker DBP-20260609-034800

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 6 dedup + issue creation worker

title: Hook perf benchmark ignores child process failures
description: `scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs` benchmarkHook destructures only `elapsed` from `measureOnce` and never checks `status`, `signal`, or `stderr`, unlike the CLI benchmark path. A missing or crashing SessionStart hook can still produce fast elapsed samples and pass the p95 gate because fast failures look like good performance.
fix_direction: Make benchmarkHook validate the full `measureOnce` result the same way benchmarkCli does, failing on non-zero status or signal and surfacing stderr. Add a regression fixture with a failing hook to prove the p95 gate fails instead of accepting fast crash samples.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 6 dedup + issue creation worker DBP-20260609-034800
